title: angraecum cornutum
intro: Angraecum cornutum, also known as the horned star orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, and has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Angraecum cornutum include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from the roots and leaves, and are often consumed as teas, infusions, or dried extracts to harness its medicinal properties.
